scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,blue "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:stack: docker compose -f backend/deployments/docker-compose.yml up -d && concurrently -n infra,backend,frontend -c yellow,green,blue "docker compose -f backend/deployments/docker-compose.yml logs -f" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
